description: Create a reusable GitHub Actions workflow named mysql that runs on an ubuntu-latest environment with a 30-minute timeout. The workflow uses a matrix strategy to test various configurations of a MySQL client build, including different compilers, renewal options, client types, HTTP libraries, sanitizers, packet versions, and MySQL versions. For each matrix combination, set up a Debian unstable container, install required packages, initialize a MySQL database, retrieve plugins, build the client, run tests, and perform extra tests if applicable.
